arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has just one doubt when it comes to his starting line-up to face Liverpool later this evening. That’s according to Relevo, who point towards…

arts.sum: Live coverage of Liverpool U19s vs Real Madrid U19s in the UEFA Youth League at the Academy in Kirkby.

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah told he's just as important as FIVE other Liverpool players amid contract row
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has sparked a row with Liverpool's chiefs over his contract situation after admitting he is 'more out than in' when it comes to his future at the title challengers

arts.ttl: 'Real Madrid wanted me – but as soon as I heard about Liverpool my mind was made up'
arts.sum: Not many players are able to turn down Real Madrid in this day and age, but one player did just that so they could play under Jurgen Klopp at Liverpool instead

arts.ttl: Man City begin Liverpool preparations with new Champions League nightmare increasing worries
arts.sum: Liverpool are locked in a Premier League title race with Manchester City, and have the opportunity to move 11 points clear when they meet at Anfield this weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool line up potential Andy Robertson replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are pursuing a deal to sign Bournemouth left-back Milos Kerkez as the club look for a long-term replacement for Andy Robertson. Kerkez has caught the eye since his £15m move to Bournemouth in 2023, with Liverpool sporting director Richard Hughes having overseen that deal during his time on the south coast. He has […] The post Liverpool line up potential Andy Robertson replacement first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: New name on Man United transfer target list following “unique” praise from Liverpool star
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly added Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush to their list of transfer targets up front. arts.ttl: Liverpool v Real Madrid: Winner announced in Alexander-Arnold transfer battle
arts.sum: Given that Trent has spent his whole career at Liverpool, it should perhaps come as little surprise that he fits the Anfield club like a glove – something that’s not been so evident when he’s played for England, for example.
